Interior Turnkey Proposal

Material Details

All material and finish specifications are written below in a corrected and client-ready format.

  • 18 mm semi-waterproof ply: Green Ply company at Rs. 100 per sq.ft.
  • 1 mm off-white, wooden, or fabric inner laminate at Rs. 530 per sheet (8 ft × 4 ft).
  • 1 mm outer laminate (8 ft × 4 ft).
  • Fevicol, Pidilite, Bluecoat, marine grade, and D3 quality adhesive.
  • All wood size and quality: 4000 sq. ft. equivalent in Saag / Burma wood quality.
  • Premium steel hinges.
  • S.S. screws.
  • Drawer telescopic channels with 10-year warranty from Excellence.
  • Bed hydraulic pump with 10-year warranty.
  • Curtains for all bedrooms and living room at Rs. 600 per meter, premium quality fabric.
  • Double curtains with sheer layer at Rs. 200 per meter.
  • Sofa material at Rs. 800, finish in leather or fabric.
  • Foam material with 7-year warranty.
  • All MDF to be waterproof HDF, Century 710.
  • Three-bedroom mattress 6 inches, Rs. 9,000 each, Sleepwell company.
  • Kitchen trolley with 8 tandem soft-close boxes, 10-year warranty, aluminum, Excellence company.

Scope of Work

1. Main Door & Safety Door

  • House entry paneling work with full-wall treatment.
  • Extra heavy lock with 10-year warranty.
  • Inside shoe box.
  • Foyer area shelf and cabinets.

2. Living Room + Kitchen

  • Main living room wall with premium texture.
  • TV unit wall paneling.
  • One L-shaped sofa.
  • Zula provision; zula not included.
  • One center table.
  • Temple unit.
  • Double curtains.

3. Kitchen + Crockery Unit

  • Fully waterproof ply.
  • Mica with glossy or matte finish.
  • Semi-modular profile door with glass finish.
  • Concealed stainless-steel handles.
  • Overhead storage.
  • Kitchen crockery unit.
  • Kitchen trolley with 8 tandem soft-close boxes.
  • One pull-out unit.
  • Basin unit box with mirror.
  • Dining table with 4 chairs.
  • One wash basin.
  • Shutters and cabinets to be finished in thermolaminate or acrylic.

4. Master Bedroom 1

  • Wardrobe and loft with 25 mm flush door.
  • Wardrobe contains 8 shelves and 4 drawers inside.
  • King-size bed 6.5 ft × 5.5 ft with 2 side tables with drawers.
  • 6 mm dressing mirror, size 5 ft × 1.5 ft, Saint Gobain.
  • Short cushion back, 6 ft × 3.5 ft.
  • Double curtains.
  • Glass partition in bathroom.
  • One wall panel in POP with groove, wallpaper, MDF moulding, or Dana texture paint.

5. Master Bedroom 2

  • Wardrobe and loft with 25 mm flush door.
  • Wardrobe contains 8 shelves and 4 drawers inside.
  • King-size bed 6.5 ft × 5.5 ft with 2 side tables with drawers.
  • 6 mm dressing mirror, size 5 ft × 1.5 ft, Saint Gobain.
  • Short cushion back, 6 ft × 3.5 ft.
  • Computer table and storage.
  • Double curtains.
  • Glass partition in bathroom.
  • One wall panel in POP with groove, wallpaper, MDF moulding, or Dana texture paint.

6. Guest Bedroom

  • Wardrobe and loft with 25 mm flush door.
  • Wardrobe contains 8 shelves and 4 drawers inside.
  • King-size bed 6.5 ft × 5.5 ft with 2 side tables with drawers.
  • 6 mm dressing mirror, size 5 ft × 1.5 ft, Saint Gobain.
  • Short cushion back, 6 ft × 3.5 ft.
  • Bathroom shelves or small cabinet.
  • Double curtains.
  • One wall panel in POP with groove, wallpaper, MDF moulding, or Dana texture paint.

Commercial Summary

Every item is based on the provided scope. Materials may be replaced by equivalent company brands of the same quality if availability changes.

Subject to market escalation clause: material and labour rates are subject to revision in case of significant market price changes.

Payment Condition

  • Stage 1: Advance for POP work and electric — 10%.
  • Stage 2: After POP work, when furniture starts — 25%.
  • Stage 3: During furniture work — 20%.
  • Stage 4: On completion of furniture — 25%.
  • Stage 5: At color work start — 15%.
  • Stage 6: Finishing stage — 5%.
  • Or weekly payment of Rs. 1,75,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 until completion.

Notes, Colour Work & Exclusions

Colour Work

  • 3 BHK full flat with lapi, putty, aster, and gisai.
  • Colour company: Asian Paint or Dulux.
  • Washable satin finish / Royal finish.

Electrical Material Details

  • Havells or RR wires and cables.
  • 40 panel lights (12W), Rs. 350 each.
  • 10 buttons (3W).
  • 100 ft profile light.
  • All lights with 2-year warranty.
  • All switch changes: Anchor Penta / K9 / GM / Alex.

POP Work

  • 12-number Dana channel with powder-coated screw fitting.
  • Fevicol patta fitting.
  • Oman / Dubai 6 ft × 4 ft gypsum board.

Included & Excluded

  • All work will be executed by a fully responsive and experienced team.
  • Material may be replaced with equivalent quality brand if unavailable.
  • Pest control treatment included.
  • All hardware: Excellence company.
  • Ply: Green Ply company.
  • All finishes to be completed in thermolaminate and acrylic.
  • Excluded: fan, AC, TV, chimney, fridge, washing machine, jhoomer, tube light, bathtub, sanitary fixtures, plumbing work, geyser, AC piping, art pieces, tile epoxy, high chair, zula, rugs, bed sit, cushion, outdoor seating, clock, mosquito net, and SS grill.
